test-method.name: testSessionPersistsAfterRefresh
test-method.description: TC_SESSION_001: Session persists after page refresh

test-method.name: testSessionPersistsAcrossNavigation
test-method.description: TC_SESSION_002: Session persists across page navigation

test-method.name: testUnauthenticatedRedirectToLogin
test-method.description: TC_SESSION_003: Unauthenticated access redirects to login

exception.message: localStorage token should be cleared after logout expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: testManualSessionClearRedirectsToLogin
test-method.description: TC_SESSION_005: Clearing session manually redirects to login

test-method.name: testLoginPageAccessibleWhenNotLoggedIn
test-method.description: TC_SESSION_006: Login page accessible when not logged in
